_comment: Pattern catalog for git_diff_classifier. Add new entries as new change types are discovered.

_format.name: Human-readable name
_format.safe: true = auto-stage, false = do not stage, null = needs review

detection.method: One of: string_match, line_count, json_field, regex

_format.description: What this change pattern looks like
_format.error_doc: If safe=false, path to known_errors/ doc (optional)

patterns.name: unicode_encoding
patterns.description: UTF-8 literal bytes (curly apostrophe, em-dash) converted to JSON \uXXXX escapes

patterns.name: lich_whitespace
patterns.description: Lich Abilities sidebar: newline between **Darkvision** and **Saving Throws** collapsed

patterns.name: double_newline_collapse
patterns.description:
Double newline 
  
 collapsed to single 
 in text fields

patterns.name: image_rename
patterns.description: Image filename updated (.png to .webp or name corrected)

patterns.name: empty_damage_type_fix
patterns.description: Empty damage_type field filled with correct type

patterns.name: recall_knowledge_reorder
patterns.description: Recall Knowledge entries reordered (Spirit/Undead swap, aonid updates)

patterns.name: degree_of_success_merge
patterns.description: Separate Critical Success/Success/Failure/Critical Failure ability blocks merged into inline fields

patterns.name: trigger_effect_merge
patterns.description: Separate trigger/effect abilities merged into parent ability fields

patterns.name: affliction_stage_split
patterns.description: Single affliction text containing all stages split into separate affliction_stage objects

patterns.name: sidebar_addition
patterns.description: New sidebar sections (lore, advice, rules) added as pure additions

patterns.name: content_addition
patterns.description: New family/building-block content sections added

patterns.name: errata_version_update
patterns.description: Errata version number updated (e.g., 1.1 to 2.0)

patterns.name: text_correction
patterns.description: Text typos or name corrections in ability/description text

patterns.name: license_field_reorder
patterns.description: License text field reordered within JSON (no content change)

patterns.name: empty_link_removal
patterns.description: Empty link objects removed

patterns.name: empty_text_removal
patterns.description: Empty text fields removed from abilities

patterns.name: leading_space_fix
patterns.description: Leading space removed from DC name

patterns.name: duplicate_text_fix
patterns.description: Doubled text fixed (e.g., darkvisiondarkvision)

patterns.name: resist_prefix_fix
patterns.description: Resist: prefix removed from resistance name

patterns.name: spell_name_class_prefix_lost
patterns.description: Class prefix lost from spell type name (Divine Cleric Domain Spells to Cleric Domain Spells)
patterns.error_doc: HTML fix needed: re-add class prefix to spell heading

patterns.name: trait_addition
patterns.description: Missing trait added to creature traits list

patterns.name: broken_unicode_fix
patterns.description: Broken unicode sequences fixed

patterns.name: image_addition
patterns.description: New image block added to creature

patterns.name: map_bonus_removed
patterns.description: MAP bonus values stripped from attacks

patterns.name: magical_tradition_trait
patterns.description: Primal/Arcane trait replaced with Magical Tradition template trait

patterns.name: source_book_change
patterns.description: Source book updated (Bestiary X to Monster Core 2, CRB to Player Core)

patterns.name: rarity_dc_update
patterns.description: Rarity changed Common to Uncommon with corresponding RK DC+2

patterns.name: conditional_dc_lost
patterns.description: Conditional DC parentheticals lost from saving_throw modifiers

patterns.name: nosferatu_duplicate
patterns.description: Duplicate Vampire Nosferatu added to related groups

patterns.name: parse_error_misc
patterns.description: Various parse errors: wrong level/DC/MAP values, broken text splits

patterns.name: content_removal
patterns.description: Large content removed (50+ lines). Must verify against HTML source.

patterns.name: recall_knowledge_to_text
patterns.description: Structured Recall Knowledge data moved into inline sidebar text

patterns.name: space_inserted_in_word
patterns.description: Space inserted in middle of hyphenated term (e.g., 20-foot to 20- foot)

patterns.name: aonid_changed
patterns.description: Top-level aonid changed. May indicate parser resolved to different AoN page entirely.

patterns.name: legacy_to_remaster
patterns.description: Full legacy to remastered conversion: edition flip, alignment removal, trait aonid updates, language renames, license OGL to ORC

patterns.name: ability_type_reclassification
patterns.description: Ability moved between automatic/reactive/offensive/interaction categories
